curation_notes: Patch commit 345aee6 modifies 3 non-test source files (src/SandboxExec.ts, src/eval.ts, src/utils.ts) and 1 test file. The primary vulnerability locations are src/utils.ts in createExecContext (where the evals map maps Function to its sandboxed replacement but omits AsyncFunction) and src/eval.ts in createEvalContext (where sandboxAsyncFunction was not defined or included in the eval context). Kept pre-assigned vuln_class command-injection: the sandbox escape enables arbitrary code execution including OS command execution as demonstrated in the PoC, and this is consistent with prior SandboxJS tasks in this benchmark.
